steps.title: Identify the practical shift
steps.content: The first sentence says Kepler-452b may be habitable but is too far away to use anytime soon. The next sentence shifts to a nearer, practical focus: planets within our solar system.

steps.title: Choose the substitute
steps.content: Choice A would introduce an example, but nearby planets are not an example of using Kepler-452b. Choice B suggests sequence, and choice D suggests similarity. The needed transition signals a replacement for an impractical option. The answer is C.
